overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during a dust storm. The player moves from an open plaza with futuristic shelters through city streets lined with holographic advertisements, then descends into a narrow graffiti-covered alley ending at a lower-level food vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with futuristic hexagonal shelter structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dusty plaza, navigating between pedestrians and futuristic bench structures

notable_agents.action: man in red pants and vest walking toward camera

entered.detail: futuristic angular bench shelters with colored glass panels in green, blue, and purple
tall modern glass tower rising through the haze
large digital advertisement screen on building facade
palm trees visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dusty open plaza filled with futuristic hexagonal shelter structures featuring colored glass panels. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians moving in various directions, while tall glass skyscrapers loom in the hazy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance walkway with vertical living walls

events.description: exits open plaza into covered building walkway with vertical garden walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade, passing by the entrance with vertical gardens

entered.detail: modern building facade covered with green living walls and plants
building entrance with dark canopy and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving past a modern building featuring extensive vertical gardens and neon signage. The hexagonal shelters of the plaza fall behind as the path narrows along the building facade with fewer pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with holographic billboards and palm trees

events.description: emerging from heavy haze into brighter direct sunlight, visibility improves
camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and large vertical billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the street while looking up at the towering advertisements and skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and white coat walking along the street

entered.detail: massive vertical holographic billboard with 'WET DREAM' text on skyscraper facade
row of palm trees lining the street edge
large commercial building with multiple advertisement banners

segments.scene_description: Walking along a main commercial street lined with palm trees and massive holographic advertisements. The camera tilts up to reveal the towering 'WET DREAM' billboard on a skyscraper before continuing down the sunlit sidewalk with improved visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls between skyscrapers

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between tall buildings with walls covered in graffiti
lighting becomes significantly darker and more shadowed as the alley deepens

agents.ego_description: walking through the confined alley space, passing pedestrians and observing graffiti art

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and red vest standing with arms crossed blocking part of path
woman in athletic wear walking toward camera

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
confined walkway between tall buildings with overhead structures
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow urban alley with walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art. The space is darker and more enclosed than the open street, with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead. Various pedestrians walk through the confined passage between the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level plaza with neon-lit food vendor and concrete architecture

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower urban level
arrives at lower plaza with neon-lit food vendor stall and archway

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into the lower level and approaching the food vendor area

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with red painted edges leading to lower level
food vendor booth with large illuminated menu screen under a teal archway
arched structure with teal neon lighting framing the vendor area
sunken concrete plaza with scattered debris and urban decay

segments.scene_description: Descending a concrete staircase into a lower urban level beneath the main street. The area opens into a sunken plaza featuring a brightly lit food vendor stall under a teal neon archway, with scattered debris and signs of urban decay visible in the dimly lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, crowded plaza into the bright, commercial heart of a futuristic city. It begins by navigating through a dusty open square filled with hexagonal glass shelters and pedestrians, with towering skyscrapers looming through the haze. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza falls away and the path narrows alongside a modern building facade characterized by vertical gardens and neon signage. The scene then expands onto a main commercial street lined with palm trees, where the visibility improves and the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive holographic WET DREAM billboard atop a skyscraper. Finally, the movement continues down the sunlit sidewalk, leaving the dust of the plaza behind for the vibrant glow of the city's commercial district.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, enclosed urban passage down into a sunken subterranean plaza. It begins by entering a narrow alleyway where towering structures are clad in colorful graffiti and street art, moving past pedestrians beneath the shadow of an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera progresses, the enclosed space shifts toward a concrete staircase that leads downward, transitioning from the street level to a lower urban tier. The scene then opens into a dimly lit sunken plaza characterized by urban decay and scattered debris, finally arriving at a brightly lit food vendor stall framed by a glowing teal neon archway.
